title: [lichen_l2.c:1221-1417] lichen_l2_iface_init: no return value to signal initialization failure
description:
Contract violation: postcondition - void return with no error signal

**Issue:** lichen_l2_iface_init() is a void function (required by Zephyr net_if_api.init signature) but can fail at multiple points. It sets iface_init_failed atomic on failure, but Zephyr doesn't check this. The interface will appear 'up' to Zephyr even though L2 operations will fail.

**Documentation at lines 1215-1218 acknowledges this:**
```
 * @note Zephyr's net_if_api.init callback signature is void(*)(struct net_if*),
 * so errors cannot be returned to the caller. Instead, on any failure this
 * function sets the iface_init_failed atomic flag...
```

**Assessment:** This is a Zephyr API constraint, not a code defect. The code correctly mitigates by:
1. Setting iface_init_failed flag
2. All L2 operations check this flag and fail gracefully

**No fix needed** - the design correctly handles Zephyr's void return constraint.
